violations.text: A sheet pan, rags and container were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC cleared handsink during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Raw animal foods (such as chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as broccoli) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC rearranged food items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator (near cooking line) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC also informed to remove cardboard from shelves. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
The handsink was observed clogged during inspection. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025
cutting board and gloves were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Raw animal foods (raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (veggies) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Cream Cheese was observed held at (50) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
Various food product were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler and dining room area ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
Cloth towels was observed being used to cover wontons in the walk in cooler. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (dry food storage bins) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The ceilings in the (kitchen and dining room area) area is in poor repair. Observed ceiling tiles with water stains. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
